CustomField.label: Run This Check When
CustomField.description: Decides whether this check applies to the current record before it runs. Always runs it every time. Otherwise you can gate it on a formula or on a record count. When the gate is not met, the check is marked Skipped.

value.label: Only when a formula is true
Only when a count query matches

CustomField.inlineHelpText: Always = run on every record. Only when a formula is true = gate on Run When Formula Is True. Only when a count query matches = gate on Run When Count Query Matches. If the gate is not met, the check is Skipped.
